description: Test vectors for lichen_hash_32 FNV-1a32 primitive (basis=0x811c9dc5, for each byte h=(h^b)*0x01000193 mod 2^32). Canonical for IID, TDMA slots, CCP channel/hop/load_factor selection per spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md §2a.3 and test/vectors/ccp*.json. Matches Rust lichen-core::lichen_hash_32, lichen-link::identity::hash_32, Python _hash_32 exactly. Independent oracle (not derived from impl). Fixes cross-impl inconsistency (project-LICHEN-eirg). All impls MUST match.

vectors.name: iid_derivation_zero
vectors.description: IID = hash_32(pubkey)[0:4] + hash_32(pubkey+0x01)[0:4] (BE, U/L bit cleared per RFC 4291)
